content: External visibility handoff: Cloudflare quick tunnels are unsuitable for handoff because the origin unregisters when the tunnel process dies, and persistent tunneling of the local repo is not acceptable. Pushed main to origin at e148719 so the existing GitHub Pages workflow deploys the curated static site (_site contains dist/examples/docs plus release docs, not the whole workspace). GitHub Actions run 29150779413 completed successfully. Public check URL: https://ai-org-labs.github.io/archmap/ . Verified 200 for /, /dist/archmap.js, and /examples/demo.html. Existing untracked reports/ was left untouched. Next: use GitHub Pages for out-of-office review; continue visual smoke on routing-quality defects only where visible.
